description_long: This object represents a construction worker figure, characterized by a dark, angular form with a distinct upper body and head region. The figure appears to be wearing a dark uniform, with some geometric simplification and minimal surface detail. There is a small, rectangular feature on the chest area, possibly representing an ID badge or a pocket. The head is topped with a slightly protruding element, which could be interpreted as a helmet, though it is not clearly defined. The overall silhouette is blocky and lacks fine anatomical detail, suggesting a stylized or low-polygon representation. The color palette is predominantly dark, with subtle highlights and a matte finish.
description: A stylized, dark-colored construction worker figure with a blocky form and minimal surface detail, featuring a small chest badge and a possible helmet.
description_view_0: The view shows the upper torso and head, with a clear view of the angular shoulders and a small rectangular badge on the chest.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the protruding headgear and the thinness of the figure's profile, with the badge appearing as a small floating element.
description_view_2: A close-up of the chest area, focusing on the rectangular badge and the smooth, dark surface of the uniform.
description_view_3: The back or side angle reveals the angular geometry of the figure and the placement of the badge, with minimal detail on the limbs.
